# OpenRates Agent Gateway

OpenRates gives AI agents and applications trustworthy current and historical currency
exchange rates. Every result includes its source, effective date, freshness classification,
rate type, confidence score, and rounding details. Official daily reference rates are
never labeled as live.

Language models do not reliably know current exchange rates and often introduce
floating-point errors. OpenRates provides a single, agent-native interface that returns
not just a number, but what the number means.

## Interfaces

**MCP (primary interface)**

Six tools:
- convert_currency — Convert an amount from one currency to another
- get_exchange_rate — Get the rate for a pair
- get_exchange_rate_series — Historical time series
- list_currencies — Discover currencies and resolve ambiguous names
- compare_exchange_rate_providers — Compare a pair across providers
- explain_exchange_rate — Explain a concept in plain language

Nine read-only resources:
- openrates://docs/quickstart
- openrates://docs/tool-selection
- openrates://docs/rate-types
- openrates://docs/freshness
- openrates://docs/errors
- openrates://providers
- openrates://currencies
- openrates://capabilities
- openrates://license

Available over stdio (local) and Streamable HTTP (remote).

**REST API**

- GET /v1/rates — Exchange rate for a pair
- GET /v1/rates/series — Historical time series
- POST /v1/convert — Convert an amount
- GET /v1/currencies — List or search currencies
- GET /v1/currencies/:code — One currency's metadata
- GET /v1/providers — Configured providers
- GET /v1/capabilities — Server capabilities
- GET /v1/health and /v1/ready — Probes
- GET /openapi.json and /docs — API reference

## Key behaviors

Freshness classes: live, recent, latest_available, latest_business_day,
historical_exact_date, historical_previous_available_date, stale, unknown.
Official daily rates never satisfy the conditions for isLive: true.

Confidence score: 0 to 1, reflecting provider trust (40%), freshness match (20%),
source timestamp (15%), provider health (10%), direct pair (10%), cross-provider
agreement (5%).

Decimal arithmetic: all calculations use Decimal.js with 50-digit precision.
Rates and amounts are strings in JSON.

## Provider contract

Every adapter implements: capabilities(), healthCheck(), getLatestRate(),
getHistoricalRate(), getTimeSeries(), listCurrencies(), normalizeError().

## Default provider: Frankfurter

Official reference rates from the European Central Bank. No API key required. Daily
updates. No intraday or live rates. Weekend and holiday requests return the most recent
prior business day.

## Configuration

OPENRATES_DEFAULT_PROVIDER=frankfurter
FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=https://api.frankfurter.dev
FRANKFURTER_TIMEOUT_MS=5000
OPENRATES_LIVE_THRESHOLD_SECONDS=300
OPENRATES_RECENT_THRESHOLD_SECONDS=3600
OPENRATES_API_AUTH_ENABLED=false
OPENRATES_RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=false

## Local start

```bash
pnpm install && pnpm build
pnpm --filter @openrates/api dev
# or
pnpm --filter @openrates/mcp dev
```
